news.title: Gevierd chef Yotam Ottolenghi over zijn liefde voor Amsterdam: ‘Ik smokkelde Holtkamp-kroketten naar Londen’ - Het Parool
news.summary:
# Summary

Celebrated chef Yotam Ottolenghi shares his love for Amsterdam, revealing that he smuggled croquettes from the iconic Dutch bakery Holtkamp back to London—highlighting how much he values this local Amsterdam spot. Visitors to Amsterdam should know that Holtkamp is beloved enough by international food figures to warrant smuggling its products across borders, making it a must-try destination for quality Dutch pastries and croquettes. The article suggests Ottolenghi's endorsement serves as a strong recommendation for anyone seeking authentic Amsterdam food experiences.

news.title: Dit is het favoriete gerecht van Ottolenghi zelf – en het staat nu op de kaart in Amsterdam - JAN Magazine
news.summary:
# Summary

This is significant for food lovers visiting Amsterdam because they can try the renowned chef's own preferred dish at his establishment. Fans of Ottolenghi's cooking style and those interested in Mediterranean cuisine will want to visit to experience this special menu item.

news.title: Amsterdam cocktail week gaat groter dan ooit - Horecamagazine.nl

This annual celebration showcases Amsterdam's best mixologists and cocktail venues, making it a must-visit for cocktail enthusiasts and food/drink tourists looking for curated experiences. If you're visiting Amsterdam during this period, it's a great time to discover new bars, enjoy creative drinks, and experience the city's thriving cocktail culture.

news.summary:

Visitors to Amsterdam should care because Ottolenghi's restaurants are popular destinations known for quality food and vibrant atmosphere, making this a notable new dining option in the city.

news.title: Beschimmeld voedsel en mensenhandel: stad Antwerpen sluit 2 handelspanden in Seefhoek - VRT
news.summary:
# Summary

The city of Antwerp has closed two commercial food establishments in the Seefhoek neighborhood due to serious health and safety violations, including moldy food and suspected human trafficking. Visitors to Antwerp should be aware of these closures and avoid these locations, as they posed significant public health and legal risks. This action highlights the importance of food safety inspections and demonstrates the city's commitment to protecting both consumers and workers.
